title: You have no choice in reading this article—maybe
description: Uri Maoz loved doing his human research, back when he was getting his PhD. title: AI Agents Are Coming for Your Dating Life
description: The developers of Pixel Societies are using AI agents to simulate social interactions. It's an attempt optimize the process of choosing new colleagues, friends, and even romantic partners.

title: Constellations
description: I. We had crash-landed on the planet. We were far from home. The spaceship could not be repaired, and the rescue beacon had failed.
